description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes using classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Made of leather for durabilityTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeRivet detail for styleCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
